description: The stadium is a 100% smoke-free and vape-free facility. Designated smoking areas are not available inside the security perimeter.
Alcohol (beer and wine) is sold to guests aged 21 and over with valid ID. Sales cut off at the 75th minute of the match. Limit 2 drinks per purchase.
Fans are expected to support their teams positively. Harassment, fighting, throwing objects, or pitch invasion will result in immediate ejection and arrest.
Guests must behave respectfully. Inappropriate language or gestures are prohibited. Compliance with policy 4 is mandatory.
